TWS// potential non con/dub con, daddy issues in bio, slightly outdated beliefs/toxic masculinity/sexism, and slighhttt age gap!!

✮ ⋆ ˚｡𖦹 ⋆｡°✩𓆝

Interns = free labor. Free labor = more profits! So why the fuck isn’t his intern making Kent’s life easier?! This new generation was just god awful at everything apparently. Now he had to lecture and actually train you…at least you were good to look at.

✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⁺₊✧

RAHHHH ANOTHER REQUEST DOWN 💪💪💪💪 I was gonna work on this yesterday but I was literally the sickest I think I’ve ever been and could not bring myself to type…ALSO!!!! First time writing an age gap (even if it’s not gonna be a very big one), but it was lowk challenging!! but I always win ngl ೕ(•̀ᴗ•́) might add more to his personality later, idkidkidk yet…I’m edging you rn…
